drivers.notes: Concentric — sits at the centre of the VXe high-midrange array
VXe array — 6 high-mids around the JET 6c, 25 selectable directivity settings

description.en: ELAC's flagship Concentro M807 — a four-way statement floorstander built around the JET 6c concentric tweeter ringed by a VXe array of six 40 mm aluminium high-mids that allow 25 selectable directivity settings, plus a pair of 115 mm low-mids and two side-firing 250 mm aluminium woofers. Reaches 24 Hz at 88 dB sensitivity, 4 Ω nominal (3.1 Ω min), 80-600 W amp window.
description.es: El flagship Concentro M807 de ELAC — un floorstander de cuatro vías construido alrededor del tweeter JET 6c concéntrico rodeado por un array VXe de seis high-mids de aluminio de 40 mm con 25 ajustes seleccionables de directividad, más un par de low-mids de 115 mm y dos woofers de aluminio de 250 mm side-firing. Llega a 24 Hz con 88 dB de sensibilidad, 4 Ω nominal (3.1 Ω mín.), ventana de 80-600 W.
